generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor measured by the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentTransmitted
]

instance MotorTorqueEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Torque‑angle position encoder located on the motor shaft"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAngleTransmitted
]

instance GearboxOutputEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Torque‑angle position encoder located on the gearbox output"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxAngleTransmitted
]

// C4: DataTransmitted (through MQTT broker)
instance MotorCurrentTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Motor current data points streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorAngleTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Motor shaft angle data points streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorTorqueEncoder
]

instance GearboxAngleTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Gearbox output angle data points streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxOutputEncoder
]

// C10: Data
instance MotorCurrentDataPoints : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timestamped data points representing motor current measured by MotorCurrentSensor"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentTransmitted
]

instance MotorAngleDataPoints : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timestamped data points representing motor shaft angle obtained from MotorTorqueEncoder"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleTransmitted
]

instance GearboxAngleDataPoints : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timestamped data points representing gearbox output angle obtained from GearboxOutputEncoder"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAngleTransmitted
]

// C10: Models
instance StructuralSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Engineering structural model (SysML component‑connector diagram) describing motor and gearboxes"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance SimulinkMotorDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model of the gearwheel dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkGearboxDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model of the cycloidal gearbox dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance TorqueVelocityAccelerationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data calculation model for torque, angular velocity, and acceleration derivation from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb‑Viscous friction model used for continuous identification against measured data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model used for continuous identification against measured data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model used for continuous identification against measured data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model used for continuous identification against measured data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkTool
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool for engineering structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralSysMLModel
]

instance MATLABSimulinkTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for executable simulation of motor, gearbox dynamics and friction models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulinkMotorDynamicsModel, SimulinkGearwheelDynamicsModel,
                     SimulinkGearboxDynamicsModel, TorqueVelocityAccelerationModel,
                     CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel,
                     DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
]

instance MqttBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for live one‑way sensor data streaming from physical robot to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotorCurrentTransmitted, MotorAngleTransmitted, GearboxAngleTransmitted
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) for asset representation and traceability"
]

instance CustomDashboardBuilder : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom dashboard built with web technologies for realtime data visualization"
]

// C6: Services
instance RealtimeDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Realtime data visualization in a unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionParameterEstimationInsight,
                     DeviationBetweenSimulatedAndMeasuredInsight,
                     ControlGainUpdateRecommendationInsight
    DTDFVocab:enables CustomDashboardBuilder
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification and comparison of friction models (Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) against measured data"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionParameterEstimationInsight
    DTDFVocab:enables MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance DynamicEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model‑based estimation of motor and gearbox dynamics from streamed sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviationBetweenSimulatedAndMeasuredInsight
    DTDFVocab:enables MATLABSimulinkTool
]

instance InsightGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Contextual insight generation for control accuracy improvement"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlGainUpdateRecommendationInsight
    DTDFVocab:enables MATLABSimulinkTool
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance JointFrictionParameterEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on joint friction parameter estimation using continuous data comparison"
]

instance DeviationBetweenSimulatedAndMeasuredInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight identifying deviations between simulated and measured torque/position"
]

instance ControlGainUpdateRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing recommendations for updated control gains or friction compensation models"
]

instance SendUpdatedControlGainsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to send updated control gains back to the robot controller as part of a closed‑loop improvement cycle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance UpdateFrictionCompensationModelAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to update friction compensation models in the controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// Component instances
instance MotorTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital twin instance of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
]

instance GearwheelTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital twin instance of the gearwheel"
]

instance GearboxTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital twin instance of the cycloidal gearbox"
]

instance SystemComponentTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital twin instance of the overall first axis system (motor + gearboxes)"
]

// Environment instance
instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorTwin, GearwheelTwin, GearboxTwin, SystemComponentTwin
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time operation: sensor data is streamed at the controller’s sampling rate (typically in the order of 1 kHz for angle and current signals), while the simulation and data‑calculation models run synchronously on an online compute node, producing outputs at the same update frequency."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital shadow comprises an Asset Administration Shell containing the engineering model, a Processing component (consuming sensor data and simulation models), several DataTrace entities (input current, measured torque/position, simulated outputs), and a visualization dashboard. All are linked via the Digital Shadow Reference Model instantiated for the first axis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design (engineering & SysML model), Manufacture (creation of the physical robot with specified parameters), Operational (continuous real‑time data capture and simulation during robot usage), and Evolution (periodic refinement of friction models based on live data)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model traceability ensures each data point can be traced back through the processing chain to the original sensor or simulation source. The simulation employs analytical friction models with verified coefficients, while data‑driven models learn from live data, thus maintaining high fidelity. Continuous identification mitigates drift due to wear, temperature, or load changes."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data is transmitted from the robot’s Siemens SINUMERIK 840D controller to the digital shadow over MQTT protocol. The Asset Administration Shell exposes the robot’s asset metadata and supports interoperation according to the AAS specification. The digital shadow processes data locally, with no additional network protocols specified."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration is limited to the data provenance via the Asset Administration Shell; no explicit integration with external information systems beyond the shell is described."
]
